name: conform-git-dep
description: Drop-in PM conformance fixture: a git dependency pinned to a full commit SHA (git+https://…#<commit>) plus a github:owner/repo#ref shorthand. The real PM resolves and serializes the RESOLVED COMMIT + integrity into its lockfile (pnpm `resolution: {commit}` / npm `resolved` git URL with #commit / bun git entry); Direction A asserts nub frozen-reads that git entry. The commit is pinned (not a floating tag) so resolution is deterministic across runs.
